infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to camera to scan QR codes.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app needs access to microphone for voice features.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: This app needs access to speech recognition to convert your voice messages into text for the AI assistant.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to your photo library to allow you to attach supporting documents (such as receipts, invoices, or bank statements) from your photos when making payments or withdrawals.
